untranslatable_reason: This signal requires detection of counterparty motivations (index rebalancing, forced liquidation orders, non-profit trading intent) and real-time order flow analysis. These require market microstructure data, order book depth, and counterparty identification — none of which are available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list (which contains only price, volume, and technical indicators). The signal also requires measuring 'loser position size vs order flow' which requires tick-level order classification data not provided. Standard OHLCV technical indicators cannot synthesize counterparty intent or order flow attribution.
translation_notes: Signal MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_8_2 is fundamentally non-translatable to a standard technical indicator-based backtest engine. It requires: (1) real-time identification of counterparty motivation types, (2) order flow classification (who is on each side), (3) liquidity/rebalancing event detection, (4) forced liquidation identification. These are advanced microstructure features requiring market data infrastructure beyond OHLCV. Recommend: implement as custom module with order book and trade classification data, or use alternative regime-based entry signals.
